stemHtml:
A crew receives a Runway Visual Range (RVR) from the tower with their line-up clearance. When lined up on the Runway, which of the following can the pilots expect to see, given this information?

1. Runway Centreline Lights
2. PAPI Lights
3. Runway Edge Lights
4. Approach Lights
5. Threshold Lights
6. Runway Centreline Markings
